title: Summer Research Intern at UIUC
description: Joined as a Summer Research Intern at the University of Illinois Urbana-Champaign (UIUC) under the UIUC++ Summer Research in Software Engineering (SRSE) 2026 program, supervised by Dr. Shin Hwei Tan.

title: Paper Accepted at ICSME 2026
description: Our paper 'An Empirical Study of Security Calibration in Large Language Models for Code' has been accepted at the IEEE International Conference on Software Maintenance and Evolution (ICSME 2026), Research Track.

title: Paper Accepted at FSE 2026
description: Our paper 'IssueGuard: Real-Time Secret Leak Prevention Tool for GitHub Issue Reports' has been accepted at the ACM International Conference on the Foundations of Software Engineering (FSE 2026), Tool Demo Track.

title: Paper Accepted at MSR 2026
description: Our paper 'Secret Leak Detection in Software Issue Reports using LLMs: A Comprehensive Evaluation' has been accepted at the IEEE/ACM International Conference on Mining Software Repositories (MSR 2026), Technical Track.

title: Paper Accepted at ESEM 2025
description: Our paper 'Secret Breach Detection in Source Code with Large Language Models' has been accepted at the ACM/IEEE International Symposium on Empirical Software Engineering and Measurement (ESEM 2025).

title: Joined BRAC University as a Lecturer
description: Joined the Department of Computer Science and Engineering at BRAC University as a full-time Lecturer.
